overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character moves along wet sidewalks beneath elevated highways, crosses intersections with passing vehicles, and passes towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with digital billboards

events.description: pedestrian in white shirt passes close to camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing illuminated billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking toward camera and passing by closely

entered.detail: large concrete elevated highway structure with yellow safety railings
large illuminated billboard displaying health warning with anatomical imagery
row of concrete barriers with yellow accent lights separating sidewalk from street
towering buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet asphalt sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, with massive digital billboards illuminating the right side of the street. A pedestrian in a white shirt passes closely by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass approaching intersection

events.description: character slows and prepares to cross the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass structure, approaching a street intersection

entered.detail: concrete parking structure with multiple open levels and illuminated advertisements

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the elevated highway, the environment becomes more enclosed and sheltered. A multi-story parking garage becomes visible on the left as the character approaches an intersection, with the large health warning billboard now behind.

events.description: black sports car drives through the intersection from left to right
character turns left after crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection, waiting for vehicles to pass, then turning left to follow the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall building facade with large red illuminated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character steps into the open intersection, crossing yellow-striped crosswalks as a black sports car drives past. After crossing, the character turns left, with the elevated highway now behind and a large red digital screen visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under building overhang with digital displays

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath building overhang

agents.ego_description: walking under a building overhang toward a large red digital display, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket and blue pants walking in same direction

entered.detail: concrete building structure creating covered walkway with vertical light strips
illuminated purple digital advertisement on building wall

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered walkway beneath a building overhang, the character continues toward the large red digital screen that now dominates the view ahead. Purple digital billboards line the right wall as other pedestrians walk in the same direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that shifts from an open street beneath a highway to a sheltered pedestrian walkway. It begins with the character walking along a wet asphalt sidewalk illuminated by massive digital billboards, passing a pedestrian in a white shirt. As the camera moves deeper under the elevated highway, the environment becomes more enclosed, revealing a multi-story parking garage on the left before the character steps into an open intersection to cross yellow-striped lines as a black sports car drives past. The scene then shifts as the character turns left, leaving the highway behind and moving toward a large red digital screen. Finally, the camera enters a covered walkway beneath a building overhang, where purple digital billboards line the walls and other pedestrians move toward the dominating red screen ahead.
